_comment: Example config for the Kamrui podium agent. Real values live in /etc/mbfd/media-control-console/config.env (gitignored, mode 0600) on-box. All token/id fields below are PLACEHOLDERS.
MC_NODE_TOKEN: SECRET — populate on-box only; never commit

advancedCanvas.endpointToken: SECRET — populate on-box only; never commit

cameraPublisher.rtmpKey: SECRET — populate on-box only; never commit
